subcodes.first_line: Be thou thankful unto thy Lord at all times. Beware lest thou grieve over that which hath befallen thee in His love and good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشکری ربک فیکل الاحیان ایاک ان تحزنی فیما ورد علیک فی حبه و رضاه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @nearness and remoteness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
